ns0:entry.ns0:title: CodePhiliaX/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CodePhiliaX/Chat2DB
Language: java
AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ReSo7200/InstaEclipse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ReSo7200/InstaEclipse
Language: java
An Instagram Xposed module with features like Developer Options, Ghost Mode, Ad-Free browsing, and Distraction-Free Mode.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/interview-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/interview-guide
Language: java
基于 Spring Boot 4.0 + Java 21 + Spring AI + PostgreSQL + pgvector + RustFS + Redis，实现简历智能分析、AI模拟面试、知识库RAG检索等核心功能。非常适合作为学习和简历项目，学习门槛低。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aeron-io/aeron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aeron-io/aeron
Language: java
Efficient reliable UDP unicast, UDP multicast, and IPC message transport

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageerle/ruoyi-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageerle/ruoyi-ai
Language: java
面向企业级市场的一站式AI应用开发框架，支持多厂商大模型统一接入与管理，具备安全可控的企业知识库与高精度检索优化能力，提供可视化流程编排、自主决策智能体与多智能体协同调度，兼容主流 Agent Skill 协议，帮助企业与开发者零门槛快速构建安全、高效、可落地的AI智能体应用与行业解决方案。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: antlr/antlr4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antlr/antlr4
Language: java
ANTLR (ANother Tool for Language Recognition) is a powerful parser generator for reading, processing, executing, or translating structured text or binary files.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/cassandra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/cassandra
Language: java
Open source transactional distributed database. Linear scalability and proven fault-tolerance on commodity hardware or cloud infrastructure without compromising performance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/doris
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/doris
Language: java
Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/kafka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/kafka
Language: java
Apache Kafka - A distributed event streaming platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elastic/elasticsearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch
Language: java
Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: janishar/mit-deep-learning-book-pdf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/janishar/mit-deep-learning-book-pdf
Language: java
MIT Deep Learning Book in PDF format (complete and parts) by Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio and Aaron Courville

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI 低代码平台，「低代码 + 零代码」双模式驱动：低代码一键生成前后端代码，零代码 5 分钟搭建系统，AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keycloak/keycloak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak
Language: java
Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
Language: java
This repository consists of the code samples, assignments, and notes for the Java data structures & algorithms + interview preparation bootcamp of WeMakeDevs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: questdb/questdb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/questdb/questdb
Language: java
QuestDB is a high performance, open-source, time-series database
